Message.content: Option 'relax_ii_for_timing' is enabled, will increase II to preserve clock frequency constraints.

Renaming port name 'mmult_hw/out' to 'mmult_hw/out_r' to avoid the conflict with HDL keywords or other object names.
-- Implementing module 'mmult_hw'
Starting scheduling ...
Pipelining loop 'L1'.

Unable to schedule 'store' operation (mmult_accel.cpp:20) of variable 'sum_1_2_19', mmult_accel.cpp:19 on array 'out_r' due to limited memory ports. Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'out_r'.
